mapper.select:
select r.id, coalesce(r.score, 0) as score, r.reason, r.status, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, p.id as product_id, p.product_name, p.price as product_price, p.image_url as product_image from cdc_product p left join cdc_recommend r on p.id = r.product_id
p.del_flag = '0' and p.status = '0'
AND p.product_name like concat('%', #{productName}, '%')
order by score desc

select r.id, r.product_id, r.score, r.reason, r.status, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, p.product_name, p.price as product_price, p.image_url as product_image from cdc_recommend r left join cdc_product p on r.product_id = p.id where r.id = #{id}

select r.id, r.product_id, r.score, r.reason, r.status, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, p.product_name, p.price as product_price, p.image_url as product_image from cdc_recommend r left join cdc_product p on r.product_id = p.id where r.status = '0' and p.status = '0' and p.del_flag = '0' order by r.score desc

select r.id, r.product_id, r.score, r.reason, r.status, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, p.product_name, p.price as product_price, p.image_url as product_image from cdc_recommend r left join cdc_product p on r.product_id = p.id where r.product_id = #{productId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into cdc_recommend (product_id, score, reason, status, create_by, remark, create_time) values (#{productId}, #{score}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from cdc_recommend where id in #{id}
